items.title: Rom Breslavski: '1000 days? I'm fighting a war of survival'
items.desc: Hostage survivor Rom Breslavski says at an event marking 1,000 days since 10/7 that he has been battling PTSD every day since his release from Hamas captivity, and vows to continue sharing his story wherever he can.

items.title: Trump administration renews pressure on International Criminal Court
items.desc: The US says it will reject any effort by court to assert authority over citizens, days after judges sue over sanctions.

items.title: The US is turning 250 – and Trump is making it all about him
items.desc: Trump is not the first president to lean into an exaggerated patriotism at a time of crisis. But the vanity of his actions signals something perhaps unique.

items.title: Russia launches attacks on Kyiv, killing at least 25 and injuring scores
items.desc: Ballistic and cruise missiles and drones were used in what Kyiv's mayor, Vitali Klitschko, said was the largest attack on the city since the war began.

items.title: With the World Cup in full swing, why have the geopolitical criticisms quietened?
items.desc: It is a difficult juggling act to be both a soccer fan and social critic. After tournaments start, it becomes even harder.

items.title: Only 1.28L, not 3.12 crore, land survey cases pending in state, says Bawankule
items.desc: Maharashtra has 1.28 lakh pending land survey cases, not 3.12 crore, says Revenue Minister Bawankule; govt taps private surveyors, weighs survey-before-registration.

items.title: A Solemn High Glagolitic Mass Celebrated in Australia
items.desc: Yesterday, the feast of the Most Precious Blood, saw an historic occasion for the preservation of the traditional Roman liturgy. Following a number of sung Slavonic Masses of the Melbourne Croatian chaplaincy in recent years, the Croatian Catholic community o…

items.title: Wari, monsoon cast shadow over voter roll revision, Cong seeks deadline extension
items.desc: Maharashtra voter roll SIR faces delays as Ashadhi Wari and monsoon disrupt door-to-door verification; Congress seeks form deadline extension to Aug 30.

items.title: Implement Peace Deal Now Speakers Urge, as Security Council Meets in Wake of Resumed Military Confrontation between Unit
items.desc: In an emergency session following resumed confrontation between the United States and Iran, the Security Council today heard of the need to implement the peace deal recently reached between the two countries lest the situation spiral further.

items.title: Stalker molests 13-yr-old girl
items.desc: Bhopal: 25-year-old arrested for allegedly stalking and molesting 13-year-old in Hanumanganj; case filed under BNS and POCSO after mother’s complaint.

items.title: Mamdani's 78-degree AC decree during brutal heat wave leaves GOP fuming over socialist 'sauna'
items.desc: Socialist Mayor Zohran Mamdani has ignited a GOP firestorm after urging residents to set their air conditioners to a certain temperature to help prevent strain on the city's power grid.

items.title: Shahpura road sinks, leaving dangerous hole at busy intersection
items.desc: Shahpura Road in Bhopal sinks at Shaitan Singh Chouraha near Manisha Market, creating a dangerous hole; no repair or diversion plan announced amid monsoon.

items.title: Man, woman killed after being hit by goods train
items.desc: Man and woman killed by goods train near Hinotiya station in Ashoknagar, MP; bodies mutilated, identity unclear, suicide suspected, probe ongoing.

items.title: UP sets July 10 deadline for tourism project tenders
items.desc: UP sets July 10 deadline to complete tenders for tourism projects approved till March 31, 2026; payments in 15 days, QR signage at heritage sites.

items.title: UP detects 1.85 lakh new TB cases in 100-day drive
items.desc: Uttar Pradesh detects 1.85 lakh new TB cases in 100-day TB Mukt Bharat drive; 31 lakh screened, 52,000 asymptomatic found, 91% high-risk areas covered.

items.title: Truck carrying rebar overturns in Gonda; 3 labourers killed
items.desc: Truck carrying rebar overturned on rain-soaked Gonda-Belsar road; 3 labourers died and 4 were injured. CM Yogi Adityanath ordered aid and treatment.

items.title: Three killed, four critical as SUV rams truck on Ayodhya highway
items.desc: Three from Gonda and Siddharth Nagar killed, four critical after SUV hit truck on Ayodhya-Lucknow highway near Mubarakganj; speeding suspected.

items.title: UK Eyes Forced Labor Ban Within Three Years
items.desc: Proponents of an import prohibition say Britain risks falling behind in barring goods made with forced labor, after once being a world leader a decade ago.

items.title: Korean-American Doctor Was Greeted With “Konnichiwa” As He Got Off A United Flight, And He Wants Answers
items.desc: A Korean-American doctor says he was greeted with “Konnichiwa” while deplaning a United flight, then confronted the man and asked whether he worked for the airline. The incident upset him and even reduced him to the wrong Asian stereotype.

items.title: DM appoints legal guardians for 12 disabled people
items.desc: Kanpur DM appoints legal guardians for 12 adults with disabilities under National Trust Act 1999, issuing certificates after verification to ensure care and legal support.
